history.content:
<thought>
The agent is facing north at (7,D). The cell directly ahead is lava (row 06 col D), so I cannot move forward. The only safe adjacent cell is to the east (row 07 col E), which is floor. I need to turn right to face east, then I can move forward to that cell. That will lead me towards the goal at (5,E).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing east. The cell ahead is a wall (#). I need to go north to reach the path toward the goal at (5,B). The safe path is: north to (6,D), then west to (6,C), then west to (6,B), then north to (5,B). I will turn left to face north, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing north. The cell directly ahead is lava, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (5,E). A safe path is to go east to (7,E), then north to (6,E), then north to the goal. I need to turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing east. The goal is at (5,B) to the northwest. The cell in front of me (east) is a wall, and west is lava. I need to go north first to (6,D), then west. I will turn left to face north.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing north. The cell directly ahead (6,D) is lava, so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right (7,E) is floor. I need to go east first to navigate around the lava. I will turn right to face east, then move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing east. The cell directly ahead (7,E) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (5,B) to the northwest. I need to go north to (6,D) first, then west. I will turn left to face north.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing north. The cell ahead is lava at (6,D), so I cannot move forward. The only safe neighbor is to the east at (7,E), which is floor. I need to go east first, then north to reach the goal at (5,E). I will turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is at (5,B) to the northwest. The cell directly ahead (north) is safe floor. I will move forward to (6,D) to begin heading towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,D) facing north. The goal is at (6,B) to the west. The cell directly north is floor, but further north is wall and west of that is lava. A safe path is to go west first: from (7,D) to (7,C) (floor), then to (7,B) (floor), then north to (6,B) (goal). So I need to turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7,D) facing west. The goal is at (5,E). The safest path is to go north twice to (5,D) then east to (5,E). I need to turn right to face north first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>
